'''dharugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encapsulation|encapsulation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encapsulation|encapsulation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dharugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhærigith|dhærigith]] || [[word:dhærigij|dhærigij]] || [[word:dhærigish|dhærigish]] || [[word:dhærigi|dhærigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dharuruguth|dharuruguth]] || [[word:dharuruguj|dharuruguj]] || [[word:dharurugush|dharurugush]] || [[word:dharurugu|dharurugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dharuguth|dharuguth]] || [[word:dharuguj|dharuguj]] || [[word:dharugush|dharugush]] || [[word:dharugu|dharugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dharufguth|dharufguth]] || [[word:dharufguj|dharufguj]] || [[word:dharufgush|dharufgush]] || [[word:dharufguf|dharufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dharuguthu|dharuguthu]] || [[word:dharuguju|dharuguju]] || [[word:dharugushu|dharugushu]] || [[word:dharuguku|dharuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dharuguth|dharuguth]] || [[word:dharuguj|dharuguj]] || [[word:dharugush|dharugush]] || [[word:dharugu|dharugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dharuguthul|dharuguthul]] || [[word:dharugujul|dharugujul]] || [[word:dharugushul|dharugushul]] || [[word:dharugukul|dharugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dharuguthuthu|dharuguthuthu]] || [[word:dharugujuju|dharugujuju]] || [[word:dharugushushu|dharugushushu]] || [[word:dharuguku|dharuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dharuguthun|dharuguthun]] || [[word:dharugujun|dharugujun]] || [[word:dharugushun|dharugushun]] || [[word:dharugukun|dharugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dharuguthuoro|dharuguthuoro]] || [[word:dharugujuoro|dharugujuoro]] || [[word:dharugushuoro|dharugushuoro]] || [[word:dharugukuoro|dharugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
